characters.appearance: Young adult female, slim build, light brown complexion. She has dark hair tied back with loose strands framing her face. Her facial features are expressive and natural.
characters.wardrobe: Dark grey long-sleeved button-up shirt with white stitching details.

characters.appearance: Young female appearance, pale complexion. She has bright red, wavy shoulder-length hair and large, animated eyes.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character B says: Do you speak English? [Do you speak English?]
Character A says: Uh, thodi thodi aati hai. [Uh, I know a little bit.]
Character B says: Let's practice! Aap kahan se hain? [Let's practice! Where are you from?]
Character A says: I am belong to Delhi. [I am belong to Delhi.]
Character B says: Close! Par sahi sentence hai: "I am from Delhi." [Close! But the correct sentence is: "I am from Delhi."]
Character A says: Okay, I am from Delhi. I am belong... no wait, I am from Delhi. [Okay, I am from Delhi. I am belong... no wait, I am from Delhi.]
Character B says: Perfect! There you go. [Perfect! There you go.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer with a relatable, common English mistake made by Indian learners.
- Demonstrates the AI tutor's gentle, non-judgmental correction style.
- Establishes a warm, encouraging tone right away.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Do you speak English?
Uh, thodi thodi aati hai.
Let's practice!
Aap kahan se hain?
I am belong to Delhi.
Close! Par sahi sentence hai:
"I am from Delhi."
Okay,
I am from Delhi.
I am belong...
No wait,
I am from Delhi.
Perfect! There you go.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: Hey, par main apni English improve kaise karungi? [Hey, but how will I improve my English?]
Character B says: Daily conversation practice se! [Through daily conversation practice!]
Character A says: Par aisi tooti-phooti English kiske saath bolun? Log judge karte hain. [But who do I speak this broken English with? People judge.]
Character B says: Mere saath! Main Supernova ki AI tutor hoon. [With me! I am Supernova's AI tutor.]
Character A says: Tumhare saath? [With you?]
Character B says: Haan! Yahan aap jitni chahein mistakes kar sakte ho, bina kisi sharam ke. [Yes! Here you can make as many mistakes as you want, without any embarrassment.]
Character A says: Wait, yeh toh sach mein kaam karega. Tumne mujhe abhi do second mein correct kiya. [Wait, this will actually work. You just corrected me in two seconds.]
Character B says: Exactly! Supernova app download karo aur roz practice karo. [Exactly! Download the Supernova app and practice daily.]
Character A says: Sahi baat hai. Main abhi Supernova download karti hoon! Let's go. [That makes sense. I'm downloading Supernova right now! Let's go.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Addresses the core user anxiety: fear of being judged for bad English.
- Positions Supernova's AI as a safe, private space for daily speaking practice.
- Ends with a strong, enthusiastic decision to download the app.
